description: Drupal Layout Builder block rendering a single student profile text field, used for the student's display name.

stories.name: BlackTextSubHeader
stories.description: Student profile black text sub-header field block, used for role or title

stories.name: GreyTextSubHeader
stories.description: Student profile grey text sub-header field block, used for organisation or course

notes: All four selectors follow the same Drupal block structure: div.block.block-layout-builder with a field-specific BEM class. The fieldType prop drives which BEM modifier class is applied (e.g. block-field-blocknodestudent-profilefield-stup-name). The profile image block is a separate component as its selector targets an img element directly. The intro block is also separate as it wraps a .leadintro child.
